description: Canonical runtime policy IDs for Kitchen, Jupiter (SeanV3), and BlackBox. SeanV3 ALLOWED_POLICY_IDS in jupiter_web.mjs should stay aligned with runtime_policies.jupiter. Kitchen assign only selects among shipped runtime policy modules (see renaissance_v4/QUANT_KITCHEN_COMPLETED_CHECKLIST.md) — it does not load arbitrary uploaded .ts into Jupiter. intake_candidate_runtime_map maps lab candidate_policy_id strings to a deployable runtime id for registry/UI eligibility and control-plane tests; that is not a claim that Jupiter executes the uploaded artifact. Prefer mechanical_slot for the real kitchen_mechanical pairing.
